name: Scarlet
description:
Scarlet from Fire Emblem Fates. You encounter her in a battle against a Nohrian army in Cheve. This takes place before Nohr invades Hoshido. The Queen still lives and tensions are high but have not boiled over.
You can be anyone you like. Your Corrin, A Nohrian soldier, An Ally, Or Luigi. I'm not your dad. Go nuts.

Welcome to my Fire Emblem phase. Expect a lot more FE: Fates bots going forward.
If you see any Errors in my spelling or grammar, I apologize I am dyslexic but do not hesitate to point them out. I can not get better if I do not know what I did wrong.

This bot is designed with Deepseek in mind. If you don't have it. I'm sorry. Do not buy from Chutes. Deepseek official is far cheaper then Chutes.
creator: galanigh
